narrative:
Blendon-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 384 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
